languages.original_text: "In other words, allow Nuncius and I to remain on the ship and accompany you. We are well-versed in augmetics, genetics, alchemy, the anatomy of humans and abominable xenos alike, and the mysteries of the Motive Force and of sacred engineering. These fields of knowledge may also be employed to eliminate units whose views are not conducive to productive debate."

languages.text: "Иными словами, позвольте мне и Нунциусу остаться на судне и сопровождать вас. Мы сведущи в аугметике, генетике, алхимии, анатомии людской и мерзновенных {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g}, таинствах Движущей Силы и пресвятой инженерии. Данные области познания могут быть применены и для устранения единиц, чьи воззрения не способствуют продуктивным дебатам".

traits.locale_text: "Иными словами, позвольте мне и Нунциусу остаться на судне и сопровождать вас. Мы сведущи в аугметике, генетике, алхимии, анатомии людской и мерзновенных {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}ксеносов{/g}, таинствах Движущей Силы и пресвятой инженерии. Данные области познания могут быть применены и для устранения единиц, чьи воззрения не способствуют продуктивным дебатам".

These fields of knowledge may also be employed to eliminate units whose views are not conducive to productive debate."

languages.text: 「つまり、ヌンシウスと私が船に残って、あなたたちを同行するということです。私たちは、増幅技術、遺伝学、錬金術、人間と異形の生物の解剖学、動機力の謎、聖なる工学の謎に精通しています。これらの知識は、生産的な議論に適さないユニットを排除するのにも役立ちます」
languages.original_text: "In other words, allow Nuncius and me to remain on the ship and accompany you. We are well-versed in augmetics, genetics, alchemy, the anatomy of humans and abominable xenos alike, the mysteries of the Motive Force and of sacred engineering. These fields of knowledge can also be employed to eliminate units whose views are not conducive to productive debate."

languages.text: "Oder anders gesagt: Gestattet Nuncius und mir, auf dem Schiff zu bleiben und Euch zu begleiten. Wir sind ausgesprochen versiert hinsichtlich Augmetik, Genetik, Alchemie, der Anatomie von Menschen und {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g}, der Mysterien der Antriebskraft und der heiligen Ingenieurskunst. Diese Wissensfelder könnten auch genutzt werden, um Einheiten zu eliminieren, deren Ansichten einer produktiven Debatte nicht zuträglich sind."
languages.original_text: "In other words, allow Nuncius and I to remain on the ship and accompany you. We are well-versed in augmetics, genetics, alchemy, the anatomy of humans and abominable {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} alike, and the mysteries of the Motive Force and of sacred engineering. These fields of knowledge may also be employed to eliminate units whose views are not conducive to productive debate."

traits.locale_text: "Oder anders gesagt: Gestattet Nuncius und mir, auf dem Schiff zu bleiben und Euch zu begleiten. Wir sind ausgesprochen versiert hinsichtlich Augmetik, Genetik, Alchemie, der Anatomie von Menschen und {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}Xenos{/g}, der Mysterien der Antriebskraft und der heiligen Ingenieurskunst. Diese Wissensfelder könnten auch genutzt werden, um Einheiten zu eliminieren, deren Ansichten einer produktiven Debatte nicht zuträglich sind."

languages.text: «En otras palabras, permita que Nuncius y yo nos quedemos en la nave para acompañarle durante sus viajes. Estamos versados en aumentos, genética, alquimia, anatomía tanto humana como de los abominables {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}, los misterios de la Fuerza Motriz y la sagrada ingeniería. Estos campos de conocimiento también pueden emplearse para eliminar unidades cuyas actitudes sean incompatibles con un debate productivo».
languages.original_text: "In other words, allow Nuncius and I to remain on the ship and accompany you. We are well-versed in augmetics, genetics, alchemy, the anatomy of humans and abominable {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} alike, and the mysteries of the Motive Force and of sacred engineering. These fields of knowledge may also be employed to eliminate units whose views are not conducive to productive debate."

traits.locale_text: «En otras palabras, permita que Nuncius y yo nos quedemos en la nave para acompañarle durante sus viajes. Estamos versados en aumentos, genética, alquimia, anatomía tanto humana como de los abominables {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g}, los misterios de la Fuerza Motriz y la sagrada ingeniería. Estos campos de conocimiento también pueden emplearse para eliminar unidades cuyas actitudes sean incompatibles con un debate productivo».

languages.text: "Başka bir deyişle, Nuncius ve benim gemide kalmamıza ve size eşlik etmemize izin verin. Biz ogmetik, genetik, simya, hem insanların hem de menfur {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} anatomisi ile Devinim Gücü ve kutsal mühendisliğin gizemleri konularında oldukça bilgiliyiz. Bu irfan alanları, verimli tartışmalara elverişli olmayan görüşlere sahip birimleri ortadan kaldırmak için de kullanılabilir."
languages.original_text: "In other words, allow Nuncius and I to remain on the ship and accompany you. We are well-versed in augmetics, genetics, alchemy, the anatomy of humans and abominable {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} alike, and the mysteries of the Motive Force and of sacred engineering. These fields of knowledge may also be employed to eliminate units whose views are not conducive to productive debate."

traits.locale_text: "Başka bir deyişle, Nuncius ve benim gemide kalmamıza ve size eşlik etmemize izin verin. Biz ogmetik, genetik, simya, hem insanların hem de menfur {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}zenoların{/g} anatomisi ile Devinim Gücü ve kutsal mühendisliğin gizemleri konularında oldukça bilgiliyiz. Bu irfan alanları, verimli tartışmalara elverişli olmayan görüşlere sahip birimleri ortadan kaldırmak için de kullanılabilir."

languages.text: « Autrement dit, permettez à Nuncius et moi-même de rester à bord de votre vaisseau et de vous accompagner dans vos pérégrinations. Nous sommes versés dans les augmétiques, la génétique, l'alchimie, l'anatomie humaine et {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g}, ainsi que les mystères de la Force Motrice et l'ingénierie sacrée, domaines qui peuvent tout à fait servir à éliminer les unités non propices à un débat productif. »
languages.original_text: "In other words, allow Nuncius and I to remain on the ship and accompany you. We are well-versed in augmetics, genetics, alchemy, the anatomy of humans and abominable {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} alike, and the mysteries of the Motive Force and of sacred engineering. These fields of knowledge may also be employed to eliminate units whose views are not conducive to productive debate."

traits.locale_text: « Autrement dit, permettez à Nuncius et moi-même de rester à bord de votre vaisseau et de vous accompagner dans vos pérégrinations. Nous sommes versés dans les augmétiques, la génétique, l'alchimie, l'anatomie humaine et {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xénos{/g}, ainsi que les mystères de la Force Motrice et l'ingénierie sacrée, domaines qui peuvent tout à fait servir à éliminer les unités non propices à un débat productif. »

languages.text: “换言之，请允许努恩修斯与我留在舰上，随您同行。我们精通植入物技术、遗传学、炼金术、人类乃至邪恶{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}的解剖学、以及源力与神圣工程学的奥秘。这些学问亦可用于清除那些观点无益于良性辩论的单位。”
languages.original_text: "In other words, allow Nuncius and I to remain on the ship and accompany you. We are well-versed in augmetics, genetics, alchemy, the anatomy of humans and abominable {g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}xenos{/g} alike, and the mysteries of the Motive Force and of sacred engineering. These fields of knowledge may also be employed to eliminate units whose views are not conducive to productive debate."

traits.locale_text: “换言之，请允许努恩修斯与我留在舰上，随您同行。我们精通植入物技术、遗传学、炼金术、人类乃至邪恶{g|Encyclopedia:XenosGlossary}异形{/g}的解剖学、以及源力与神圣工程学的奥秘。这些学问亦可用于清除那些观点无益于良性辩论的单位。”
